title: Report on the proposed Scottish Investment Zones subsidy scheme by Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government
body: "The SAU has published a report providing advice to UK Ministry of Housing Communities and Local Government (MHCLG) concerning its proposed Scottish Investment Zones subsidy scheme.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of MHCLG’s Assessment of Compliance of its proposed scheme with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the proposed Scottish Investment Zones subsidy scheme by Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government page.  "
